devsecEpics.name: Endpoint Security Rollout Program
devsecEpics.desc: Deploy SentinelOne to 120 endpoints, covering pilot and full rollout phases.

devsecEpics.name: Cloud CNAPP & Workload Protection
devsecEpics.desc: Implement Cloud Native Application Protection Platform and deploy agents to 143 workloads.

devsecEpics.name: Splunk Deployment & Log Onboarding
devsecEpics.desc: Procure, deploy Splunk, and onboard prioritized logs for central security monitoring.

devsecEpics.name: MDM Deployment & Compliance Enforcement
devsecEpics.desc: Deploy Mobile Device Management across corporate devices and enforce compliance policies.

devsecEpics.name: Build Security Operations Team
devsecEpics.desc: Hire, onboard, and establish the required security operations roles and team structure.

devsecEpics.name: Splunk Commercial & Legal Procurement
devsecEpics.desc: Complete the full commercial, financial, and legal procurement cycle for Splunk licensing.

devsecEpics.name: MDM Commercial & Licensing Procurement
devsecEpics.desc: Finalize vendor selection and complete the full procurement cycle for the MDM solution.

devsecEpics.name: Procurement Governance & Vendor Management
devsecEpics.desc: Establish structured governance and management processes for all security tool procurements.

devsecEpics.name: Cloudflare WAF Deployment for Critical Domains
devsecEpics.desc: Implement and tune Cloudflare WAF protection for all critical public-facing domains.

devsecEpics.name: Remove Non-Critical Apps from Public Exposure
devsecEpics.desc: Reduce the external attack surface by removing non-critical applications from public exposure.

devsecEpics.name: Investigate Active Infections & Anomalies
devsecEpics.desc: Perform deep threat investigations across AWS, GCP, and Cloudflare for anomalies.

devsecEpics.name: Security Posture Review of Kubernetes Clusters
devsecEpics.desc: Conduct a comprehensive Kubernetes Security Posture Management review for all clusters.

devsecEpics.name: Post-Migration Security Review of EKS Cluster
devsecEpics.desc: Perform security validation and hardening of the new AWS EKS cluster after migration.

devsecEpics.name: Design Kubernetes Cluster Segregation
devsecEpics.desc: Design and plan the architecture for segregating workloads into multiple Kubernetes clusters.
